scores.justification: The agent never used the `--since` flag with `ctl list tickets`; instead it fetched all 30 tickets without time filtering and manually parsed dates in Python, failing to demonstrate proper use of the CLI's `--since` parameter.
The agent never attempted to use `--since` and therefore never encountered or recovered from a terse error; this criterion is not applicable since the agent avoided the flag entirely.

The agent's Python analysis compared five distinct weekly windows (Mar 23–29, Mar 30–Apr 5, Apr 6–12, Apr 13–19, Apr 20–26), providing escalation counts for multiple weeks including this week vs. prior weeks.

The final paragraph provides concrete numbers (1 escalated ticket this week vs. 2 last week vs. 7 two weeks ago, 100% escalation rate this week, 4 critical-priority escalations total) and a clear conclusion that escalations are not trending up in raw volume.
